subject: RTE_FUNC_PTR_OR_* macros
truth: Stop using RTE_FUNC_PTR_OR_* macros; they have been removed from EAL.
quote: eal: Removed deprecated `RTE_FUNC_PTR_OR_*` macros.

subject: RTE_ETH_DEV_BONDED_SLAVE macro
truth: Stop using RTE_ETH_DEV_BONDED_SLAVE; it has been removed from ethdev.
quote: ethdev: Removed deprecated macro `RTE_ETH_DEV_BONDED_SLAVE`.

subject: flow_classify library
truth: Stop using the flow_classify library and its examples; they have been removed.
quote: flow_classify: Removed flow classification library and examples.

subject: KNI library and driver
old: Kernel Network Interface (KNI) library and driver
truth: Stop using the KNI library and driver; they have been removed.
quote: kni: Removed the Kernel Network Interface (KNI) library and driver.

from_fact: kernel network interface (kni) library and driver

subject: crypto algorithm string arrays
truth: Stop using rte_crypto_cipher_algorithm_strings, rte_crypto_auth_algorithm_strings, rte_crypto_aead_algorithm_strings, and rte_crypto_asym_xform_strings; they have been removed from cryptodev.
quote: cryptodev: Removed the arrays of algorithm strings `rte_crypto_cipher_algorithm_strings`, `rte_crypto_auth_algorithm_strings`, `rte_crypto_aead_algorithm_strings` and `rte_crypto_asym_xform_strings`.

subject: SM2 xform parameter
old: explicit SM2 xform parameter in asymmetric xform
truth: Stop using the explicit SM2 xform parameter in asymmetric xform; it has been removed from cryptodev.
quote: cryptodev: Removed explicit SM2 xform parameter in asymmetric xform.

from_fact: explicit sm2 xform parameter in asymmetric xform

subject: reserved_opts field
truth: Stop using the reserved_opts field from struct rte_security_ipsec_sa_options; it has been removed from security.
quote: security: Removed deprecated field `reserved_opts` from struct `rte_security_ipsec_sa_options`.

subject: rte_ml_io_input_size_get and rte_ml_io_output_size_get
truth: Stop using rte_ml_io_input_size_get and rte_ml_io_output_size_get; they have been removed from mldev.
quote: mldev: Removed functions `rte_ml_io_input_size_get` and `rte_ml_io_output_size_get`.

subject: cmdline_poll function
truth: Stop using cmdline_poll; it has been removed from cmdline.
quote: cmdline: Removed broken and unused function `cmdline_poll`.

subject: rte_thread_create_control()
truth: Stop passing attributes to rte_thread_create_control(); it no longer accepts them.
quote: Function `rte_thread_create_control()` no longer takes attributes.

subject: rte_thread_setname()
truth: Replace rte_thread_setname() with rte_thread_set_name().
quote: `rte_thread_setname()` and `rte_ctrl_thread_create()`, replaced with `rte_thread_set_name()` and `rte_thread_create_control()`.

subject: rte_ctrl_thread_create()
truth: Replace rte_ctrl_thread_create() with rte_thread_create_control().
quote: `rte_thread_setname()` and `rte_ctrl_thread_create()`, replaced with `rte_thread_set_name()` and `rte_thread_create_control()`.

subject: RTE_CPUFLAG_NUMFLAGS
truth: Stop using RTE_CPUFLAG_NUMFLAGS; it has been removed.
quote: Removed `RTE_CPUFLAG_NUMFLAGS` to prevent misusage and theoretical ABI issues.

subject: rss_key_len in rte_eth_rss_conf
old: defaults to 40 bytes when rss_key is set
new: user must provide rss_key_len when rss_key != NULL
truth: You must now set rss_key_len in rte_eth_rss_conf when providing rss_key; it no longer defaults to 40 bytes.
quote: `rte_eth_dev_configure` or `rte_eth_dev_rss_hash_update` now require user-provided `rss_key_len` in `rte_eth_rss_conf` when `rss_key != NULL`; no longer defaults to 40 bytes.

from_fact: defaults to 40 bytes when rss_key is set
user must provide rss_key_len when rss_key != null

subject: cryptodev ECDSA/SM2 key location
truth: Stop accessing ECDSA/SM2 keys from rte_crypto_ecdsa_op_param or rte_crypto_sm2_op_param; they are now in rte_crypto_ec_xform per-session.
quote: Elliptic curve asymmetric private/public keys maintained per-session. Keys moved from `rte_crypto_ecdsa_op_param` and `rte_crypto_sm2_op_param` to `rte_crypto_ec_xform`.

subject: rte_security_ops and rte_security_ctx visibility
new: moved to internal headers, not visible to applications
truth: Stop accessing rte_security_ops and rte_security_ctx directly; they are now internal and not visible to applications.
quote: Structures `rte_security_ops` and `rte_security_ctx` moved to internal headers, not visible to applications.

from_fact: moved to internal headers, not visible to applications

subject: rte_pcapng_copy and rte_pcapng_write_stats
truth: Stop passing time parameters to rte_pcapng_copy and rte_pcapng_write_stats; they have been removed.
quote: Time parameters removed from `rte_pcapng_copy` and `rte_pcapng_write_stats`.

subject: rte_kvargs_process
new: rejects key-only input, handles only key=value
truth: rte_kvargs_process now rejects key-only input; use rte_kvargs_process_opt for key-only support.
quote: `rte_kvargs_process` now handles only `key=value` cases, rejecting key-only input.

from_fact: rejects key-only input, handles only key=value

subject: rte_kvargs_process and rte_kvargs_process_opt
truth: Both rte_kvargs_process and rte_kvargs_process_opt now reject NULL kvlist parameter.
quote: Both functions reject NULL `kvlist` parameter.

subject: rte_ipv6_hdr and extensions alignment
truth: rte_ipv6_hdr, rte_ipv6_routing_ext, and rte_ipv6_fragment_ext are now two-byte aligned, which may affect struct layouts and casts.
quote: `rte_ipv6_hdr` and extensions (`rte_ipv6_routing_ext`, `rte_ipv6_fragment_ext`) marked as two-byte aligned.

subject: ICMP echo reply/request constants
truth: Replace RTE_IP_ICMP_ECHO_REPLY with RTE_ICMP_TYPE_ECHO_REPLY and RTE_IP_ICMP_ECHO_REQUEST with RTE_ICMP_TYPE_ECHO_REQUEST.
quote: Deprecated ICMP symbols: `RTE_IP_ICMP_ECHO_REPLY` and `RTE_IP_ICMP_ECHO_REQUEST` replaced with `RTE_ICMP_TYPE_ECHO_REPLY` and `RTE_ICMP_TYPE_ECHO_REQUEST`.

subject: __rte_ethdev_trace_rx_burst symbol
truth: Stop using __rte_ethdev_trace_rx_burst; it has been removed.
quote: Removed the `__rte_ethdev_trace_rx_burst` symbol, as the corresponding tracepoint was split into two separate ones for empty and non-empty calls.

subject: Amazon ENA driver devargs
truth: Stop using enable_llq, normal_llq_hdr, and large_llq_hdr devargs for the Amazon ENA driver; use the unified llq_policy devarg instead.
quote: Removed `enable_llq`, `normal_llq_hdr`, `large_llq_hdr` devargs, replaced with unified `llq_policy` devarg.

subject: cryptodev enum values
truth: Stop using RTE_CRYPTO_ASYM_XFORM_TYPE_LIST_END and RTE_CRYPTO_RSA_PADDING_TYPE_LIST_END as they have been removed.
quote: removed `RTE_CRYPTO_ASYM_XFORM_TYPE_LIST_END` and `RTE_CRYPTO_RSA_PADDING_TYPE_LIST_END`

subject: eventdev single-event function pointers
truth: Stop using single-event function pointers from rte_event_fp_fps as they have been removed.
quote: removed single-event function pointers from `rte_event_fp_fps`
